```shell
  PARTICIPANT1=$(echo "localhost:"$(jq -r ".participant1.jsonApi" external_party_onboarding_multi_hosted.json))

  SYNCHRONIZER_ID=$(curl -sS -f -L ${PARTICIPANT1}/v2/state/connected-synchronizers | jq ".connectedSynchronizers[0].synchronizerId")

  openssl genpkey -algorithm ed25519 -outform DER -out private_key.der

  openssl pkey -in private_key.der -pubout -outform DER -out public_key.der 2> /dev/null

  PUBLIC_KEY_BASE64=$(base64 -i public_key.der)
```
